title: shadow
description: This resource pack brings a sleek and modern visual experience to Minecraft with a transparent GUI and a striking white and black color theme.
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8770d00c28e1ea0bddda6f1f79280272fb75a38c.png)
**THIS RESOURCEPACK FEATURES:**

• Transparent GUI: The user interface elements such as the inventory, hotbar, and menus feature a clean, semi-transparent design, allowing players to focus on the world around them while maintaining all the functionality of the original GUI.


• White/Black Theme: The theme uses a balanced blend of white and black tones for various in-game elements, creating a high-contrast, visually appealing experience that suits both light and dark gameplay environments. This color scheme gives the game a more polished and modern look.


• Minimalist Style: With clean lines, subtle textures, and smooth gradients, the resource pack provides an uncluttered view of Minecraft's interface, making it easier to navigate while keeping the game feeling fresh and contemporary.

• Also features an animated totem and old bed models.

To make suggestions and requests join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/factory)
